misconfig_patterns: root with empty password risk in development deployments
Status server at :10080 exposes git_hash and version without auth
VECTOR type support (TiDB 7.5+) — detectable via SHOW CREATE TABLE with auth

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must include git_hash field — unique to TiDB status server

deployment_tells: MySQL wire at :4000 — mysql -h host -P 4000 -u root (may be empty password)
pivot_paths: GET :10080/status → TiDB version (git_hash) for CVE matching
MySQL :4000 → root empty-password attempt → SHOW DATABASES
SHOW CREATE TABLE {t} → detect VECTOR type columns (TiDB 7.5+)
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
